purpose: Fixes the M1->M15 derivation contract for the design-data span. The byte-level derived M15 files, their SHA-256 checksums, and the value-pinned JPY/non-JPY aggregation tests are produced by the code-only implementation PR (gate 5), because the aggregation code does not exist yet and must be created and audited before any real derivation.

input_identity.source_checksum_authority: committed PR-B.1 per-file SHA-256 + size + ts bounds

aggregation_contract.bucket_convention: floor(source_minute / 15) on the UTC clock; bar timestamp = bucket start
aggregation_contract.ohlc_rule: per side (bid, ask): open=first M1 open in bucket, close=last M1 close, high=max M1 highs, low=min M1 lows
aggregation_contract.incomplete_buckets: recorded for gap diagnostics only; never create labels or events; retained for indicator history subject to T-1 warm-up policy
aggregation_contract.missing_minute_policy: absent minutes remain absent; per-file gap report (count + max gap) in the derived inventory
aggregation_contract.spread_field: per-bar quoted spread = ask_close - bid_close (open-side variant also recorded)

value_pinned_tests_required_before_any_r: JPY-scale synthetic bucket -> exact expected OHLC/spread/pip outputs
non-JPY-scale synthetic bucket -> exact expected outputs
